acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Adapter trait and typed errors compile under workspace lints.
Contract includes create, configure, park, remove, list, reconcile, and bind operations.
No capture, encode, transport, or session code depends on Hyprland types.
Unit tests or compile-time examples cover the expected lifecycle.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: `nix develop -c just test` passed with 8 tests.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node is a platform-neutral Rust contract with mock lifecycle tests; real compositor backend validation belongs to later nodes.
